doorRelayPin.title: Relay GPIO Pin (BCM)
doorRelayPin.description: BCM GPIO number connected to the relay (e.g. 8 = physical pin 24)

doorSensorPin.title: Sensor GPIO Pin (BCM)
doorSensorPin.description: BCM GPIO number connected to the door sensor (e.g. 23 = physical pin 16)

duration_ms.title: Relay Pulse Duration (ms)
duration_ms.description: How long to pulse the relay in milliseconds. 200-500ms works for most garage openers.

gpiochip.title: GPIO Chip (optional)
gpiochip.description: GPIO chip device name e.g. gpiochip0. Leave blank to auto-detect.

input_pull.title: Sensor Pull Resistor
input_pull.description: Internal pull resistor for the sensor pin.

legacyGpiod.title: Legacy gpiod v1 Mode
legacyGpiod.description: Enable only on Pi 4 or older systems running gpiod v1 (Bullseye). Leave off for Pi 5 / Bookworm.
